allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: client creation API, McCann rental listings, email/analytics fixes

- Route client creation through POST /api/clients/create \(server-side with service role key\)
- Show Create Client button on every form step, only name required
- Display error feedback when client creation fails
- Pull properties from mccannrealtors.vercel.app rental catalog instead of MLS
- Update properties page for rental display \(weekly rates, sleeps, availability\)
- Add zod validation and activity logging to email send API
- Replace mock emails with real activity-based sent history
- Fix analytics page: graceful handling of empty/missing tables, error state UI
- Make getDashboardStats resilient to missing data
- Allow nullable email in schema migration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
